svg.text: 皮膚科鑑別診斷演算法 — Dermatology Differential Diagnosis Algorithm
以原發病灶形態（Primary Lesion Morphology）為核心之分類系統
Step 1: Identify Primary Lesion（鑑別原發病灶）
先找出單一、最早出現的病灶形態，這是整個鑑別診斷的關鍵第一步
Step 2: Assess Distribution & Configuration（評估分布與排列）
病灶位置與排列方式是縮小鑑別診斷範圍的重要線索
Distribution & Configuration Patterns（分布與排列型態）
Step 3: Symptom Quality（症狀特質）— Itch vs Pain vs Asymptomatic
癢感多見於發炎性疾病，疼痛多見於感染或缺血性疾病，無症狀則需考慮腫瘤
Step 4: Time Course（時間病程）— Acute vs Chronic
急性發作（小時∼天）vs 慢性持續（週∼年），大幅縮小範圍
Urticaria | Contact dermatitis | Drug eruption | Viral exanthem |
Herpes zoster | Cellulitis | Impetigo | SJS/TEN | Erythema multiforme
Lupus erythematosus | Chronic urticaria | Lichen planus
Step 5: Confirm with Diagnostic Tools（輔助工具確認）
Gold standard — H&E, special stains, IF
Quick Algorithm — 快速鑑別流程
6️⃣ Narrow differential by associated systemic signs (fever, arthralgia, mucosal)
Quick Reference: Lesion → Category → Sample Diseases（病灶 → 分類 → 常見疾病）
Any lesion type + signs of infection (cellulitis, impetigo, tinea)
This algorithm is a clinical decision support tool — always correlate with patient history, exam, and confirmatory testing.
整理自：Fitzpatrick's Dermatology, Andrews' Diseases of the Skin, oraz 實證皮膚科學臨床指引
